title: eremiris pallasii
intro: Eremiris pallasii, also known as the Russian chamomile or Pallas' wormwood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It is native to the steppes of Eastern Europe and Western Asia, and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eremiris pallasii include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting sleep, and alleviating digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
